===================
===================
=== BOB DYLAN - Hattiesburg, Mississippi May 1st 1976_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - Hattiesburg, Mississippi May 1st 1976 (New Transfer from Tape) JTT

BOB DYLAN
Reid Green Coliseum
Hattiesburg, Mississippi
May 1st 1976

Good Mono Audience Recording

SOURCE: Low Generation Cassettes (GS) > Akai GX95 11 (Playback) > Soundforge PRO 10c > WAV >
FLAC Frontend Level 8 Align on Sector Boundaries

All bad transitions cleaned

Mastering & Artwork by JTT, October 2012

Disc One
01. MR. TAMBOURINE MAN
02. SIMPLE TWIST OF FATE
03. VINCENT VAN GOGH
04. I'LL BE YOUR BABY TONIGHT
05. MAGGIE'S FARM
06. ONE TOO MANY MORNINGS
07. ISIS
08. BLOWIN' IN THE WIND
09. RAILROAD BOY
10. I PITY THE POOR IMMIGRANT
11. SHELTER FROM THE STORM
12. I THREW IT ALL AWAY

Disc Two
01. STUCK INSIDE OF MOBILE WITH THE MEMPHIS BLUES AGAIN
02. YOU'RE A BIG GIRL NOW
03. YOU'RE GONNA MAKE ME LONESOME WHEN YOU GO
04. LAY LADY LAY
05. MOZAMBIQUE
06. IDIOT WIND
07. KNOCKIN' ON HEAVEN'S DOOR
08. GOTTA TRAVEL ON

+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
PLEASE DO NOT CONVERT TO LOSSY FILES AND UPLOAD LINKS ON
OTHER SITES OR REMASTER OTHER THAN FOR PERSONAL USE
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
